```json
{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee in a Ljubljana Café",
  "key_phrases": [
    {"phrase": "Želim kavo", "translation": "I want a coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
    {"phrase": "Kavno pivo, prosim", "translation": "A coffee, please"},
    {"phrase": "Želim vročo kavo", "translation": "I want a hot coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
    {"phrase": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"}
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "At the Café Counter",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Želim kavo, prosim.", "translation": "I want a coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Imamo kavno pivo, espresso in capuccino.", "translation": "We have coffee, espresso, and cappuccino."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Želim vročo kavo, prosim.", "translation": "I want a hot coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 2 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Da, imamo sladko kavo.", "translation": "Yes, we have sweet coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kavno pivo, prosim.", "translation": "A coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Evo, vaša kava.", "translation": "Here is your coffee."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for Sugar",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Želim še sladko kavo, prosim.", "translation": "I want sweet coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Ali želite še kakšno sladkarijo?", "translation": "Do you want any pastry?"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Ne, hvala. Želim samo kavo.", "translation": "No, thank you. I just want coffee."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Koliko sladkorja želite?", "translation": "How much sugar do you want?"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Želim en sladkor.", "translation": "I want one sugar."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Evo, vaša kava.", "translation": "Here is your coffee."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Paying for Coffee",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 2 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Tukaj je 2 evra.", "translation": "Here are 2 euros."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Hvala. Želite še kaj?", "translation": "Thank you. Do you want anything else?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ne, hvala. Želim samo kavo.", "translation": "No, thank you. I just want coffee."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Nasvidenje.", "translation": "Goodbye."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Ordering Coffee to Go",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Želim kavo, prosim. Želim jo vzeti s sabo.", "translation": "I want a coffee, please. I want to take it with me."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Imamo kavno pivo, espresso in capuccino.", "translation": "We have coffee, espresso, and cappuccino."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Želim vročo kavo, prosim.", "translation": "I want a hot coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Stane 2 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2 euros."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for the Bill",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Račun, prosim.", "translation": "The bill, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Tukaj je račun.", "translation": "Here is the bill."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 2 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Tukaj je 2 evra.", "translation": "Here are 2 euros."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Hvala. Želite še kaj?", "translation": "Thank you. Do you want anything else?"}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dialogue_glosses": [
    {"word": "kavo", "translation": "coffee"},
    {"word": "prosim", "translation": "please"},
    {"word": "imate", "translation": "you have"},
    {"word": "kavno", "translation": "coffee"},
    {"word": "pivo", "translation": "beer"},
    {"word": "espresso", "translation": "espresso"},
    {"word": "capuccino", "translation": "cappuccino"},
    {"word": "vročo", "translation": "hot"},
    {"word": "sladko", "translation": "sweet"},
    {"word": "koliko", "translation": "how much"},
    {"word": "stane", "translation": "it costs"},
    {"word": "evra", "translation": "euros"},
    {"word": "evo", "translation": "here is"},
    {"word": "vaša", "translation": "your"},
    {"word": "kava", "translation": "coffee"},
    {"word": "še", "translation": "also"},
    {"word": "sladkarija", "translation": "pastry"},
    {"word": "hvala", "translation": "thank you"},
    {"word": "račun", "translation": "bill"},
    {"word": "nasvidenje", "translation": "goodbye"}
  ],
  "morphology_focus": [
    {"lemma": "biti", "surface": "imam", "feature": "verb:1sg", "gloss": "I have"},
    {"lemma": "biti", "surface": "imaš", "feature": "verb:2sg", "gloss": "you have"},
    {"lemma": "biti", "surface": "ima", "feature": "verb:3sg", "gloss": "he/she/it has"},
    {"lemma": "kava", "surface": "kavo", "feature": "noun:acc:sg", "gloss": "coffee (accusative)"},
    {"lemma": "sladkor", "surface": "sladkorja", "feature": "noun:gen:sg", "gloss": "sugar (genitive)"}
  ]
}
```

```json
{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee at a Busy Café in Oslo",
  "key_phrases": [
    {"phrase": "Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe", "translation": "I would like a coffee"},
    {"phrase": "En espresso takk", "translation": "An espresso, please"},
    {"phrase": "Kaffen er for varm", "translation": "The coffee is too hot"},
    {"phrase": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen", "translation": "I'll take the sugar packet"},
    {"phrase": "En cappuccino bitte", "translation": "A cappuccino, please"}
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "At the Counter",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hei, hva kan jeg hjelpe deg med?", "translation": "Hi, what can I help you with?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe, takk.", "translation": "I would like a coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "En espresso eller en vanlig kaffe?", "translation": "An espresso or a regular coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "En espresso takk.", "translation": "An espresso, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Vil du ha sukker eller melk i kaffen?", "translation": "Do you want sugar or milk in your coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen, takk.", "translation": "I'll take the sugar packet, thank you."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Her har du kaffen. Ha det!", "translation": "Here's your coffee. Enjoy!"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for a Different Coffee",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Unnskyld, jeg vil ha en annen kaffe.", "translation": "Excuse me, I would like a different coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hva er galt med kaffen du har?", "translation": "What's wrong with the coffee you have?"},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Kaffen er for varm.", "translation": "The coffee is too hot."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Jeg kan gi deg en ny kaffe. Hva vil du ha?", "translation": "I can give you a new coffee. What would you like?"},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "En cappuccino bitte.", "translation": "A cappuccino, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ja, selvfølgelig. Jeg kommer tilbake med en cappuccino.", "translation": "Yes, of course. I'll come back with a cappuccino."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Takk, det er veldig hyggelig av deg.", "translation": "Thanks, that's very nice of you."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Paying for the Coffee",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hvor mye skal jeg betale?", "translation": "How much do I need to pay?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Det blir 40 kroner, takk.", "translation": "That will be 40 kroner, thank you."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Her har du pengene.", "translation": "Here's the money."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Takk, ha det bra!", "translation": "Thanks, you're welcome!"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ja, du også. Ha det!", "translation": "Yes, you too. Bye!"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for the Bill",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Kan jeg få regningen, takk?", "translation": "Can I have the bill, please?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ja, selvfølgelig. Her har du regningen.", "translation": "Yes, of course. Here's the bill."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Hvor mye skal jeg betale?", "translation": "How much do I need to pay?"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Det blir 50 kroner, takk.", "translation": "That will be 50 kroner, thank you."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Her har du pengene.", "translation": "Here's the money."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Takk, ha det bra!", "translation": "Thanks, you're welcome!"}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dialogue_glosses": [
    {"word": "hei", "translation": "hi"},
    {"word": "hva", "translation": "what"},
    {"word": "kan", "translation": "can"},
    {"word": "jeg", "translation": "I"},
    {"word": "hjelpe", "translation": "help"},
    {"word": "deg", "translation": "you"},
```
